'''vashuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamarra|zamarra]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamarra|zamarra]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vashuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væshiwith|væshiwith]] || [[word:væshiwij|væshiwij]] || [[word:væshiwish|væshiwish]] || [[word:væshiwi|væshiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashushuwuth|vashushuwuth]] || [[word:vashushuwuj|vashushuwuj]] || [[word:vashushuwush|vashushuwush]] || [[word:vashushuwu|vashushuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashuwuth|vashuwuth]] || [[word:vashuwuj|vashuwuj]] || [[word:vashuwush|vashuwush]] || [[word:vashuwu|vashuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashufwuth|vashufwuth]] || [[word:vashufwuj|vashufwuj]] || [[word:vashufwush|vashufwush]] || [[word:vashufwuf|vashufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vashuwuthu|vashuwuthu]] || [[word:vashuwuju|vashuwuju]] || [[word:vashuwushu|vashuwushu]] || [[word:vashuwuku|vashuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vashuwuth|vashuwuth]] || [[word:vashuwuj|vashuwuj]] || [[word:vashuwush|vashuwush]] || [[word:vashuwu|vashuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vashuwuthul|vashuwuthul]] || [[word:vashuwujul|vashuwujul]] || [[word:vashuwushul|vashuwushul]] || [[word:vashuwukul|vashuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vashuwuthuthu|vashuwuthuthu]] || [[word:vashuwujuju|vashuwujuju]] || [[word:vashuwushushu|vashuwushushu]] || [[word:vashuwuku|vashuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vashuwuthun|vashuwuthun]] || [[word:vashuwujun|vashuwujun]] || [[word:vashuwushun|vashuwushun]] || [[word:vashuwukun|vashuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vashuwuthuoro|vashuwuthuoro]] || [[word:vashuwujuoro|vashuwujuoro]] || [[word:vashuwushuoro|vashuwushuoro]] || [[word:vashuwukuoro|vashuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
